CREATE TABLE shapes (id int, shape geometry);
SELECT id, bif:ST_XMin(shape) as xmin FROM shapes WHERE ST_XMin(shape) > 0;
SELECT id, bif:ST_XMin(shape) as xmin FROM shapes WHERE bif:ST_XMin(shape) BETWEEN 0 AND 2;
SELECT id, bif:ST_XMin(shape) as xmin FROM shapes WHERE bif:ST_XMin(shape) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT s1.id, bif:ST_XMin(s1.shape) as xmin FROM shapes s1 INNER JOIN shapes s2 ON bif:ST_XMin(s1.shape) = bif:ST_XMin(s2.shape) WHERE s1.id != s2.id;
SELECT id, bif:ST_XMin(shape) as xmin FROM shapes WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM shapes s2 WHERE bif:ST_XMin(s2.shape) < 2 AND s2.id = shapes.id);
SELECT id, bif:ST_XMin(shape) as xmin FROM shapes ORDER BY xmin DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, bif:ST_XMin(shape) as xmin FROM shapes GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
